docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE 1033 CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE (TRANSACTION ID # 100026360) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FELLOWSHIP FINANCIAL ENTERPRISES CORPORATION
REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT CASILLAS, SERGIO HEARING SET FOR APR-19-2017 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT SERGIO CASILLAS' MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT AND GRANT LEAVE TO FILE ANSWER IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR FEES IS DENIED PER THE COURT'S DISCRETION ON THE GROUNDS THAT UNDER THE CIRCUMSTANCES PRESENTED BY THIS MOTION AWARDING FEES IS NOT "JUST." ORDER IS SIGNED. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-05-2018 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-03-2017 Continued To Jan-24-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment And Grant Leave To File Answer
Off Calendar Jun-27-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Matt Sperling, Esq. (949-861-1994) of Addepar for Defendant SERGIO CASILLAS.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT SERGIO CASILLAS' Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment And Grant Leave To File Answer is GRANTED. Mr. Casillas has made a sufficient showing of mistake and excusable neglect per CCP 473(b) to warrant the setting aside of the default and default judgment. California's strong policy of deciding cases on their merits and the absence of any discernable legal prejudice to plaintiff Fellowship Financial Enterprises Corporation also support the granting of this motion. Plaintiff's request for fees is denied per the court's discretion on the grounds that under the circumstances presented by this motion awarding fees is not "just." Order is signed. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. =(302/HK)
